Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We have Buff Potato Sprouts in stock! Please come take some cute seedlings home with you. {f 1 3 132}{f 1 3 132}[n]=========================[n]Color your heart and lifestyle.[n]~Rafflesia Flower Shop~[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We have Amronion Sprouts in stock! Please come take some cute seedlings home with you. {f 1 3 132}{f 1 3 132}[n]=========================[n]Color your heart and lifestyle.[n]~Rafflesia Flower Shop~[n]{f 1 1}
